title: 9 Lock Your Debit Card
body_text:
9	Lock Your Debit Card
9.1	Overview of Lock Your Debit Card
Lock Your Debit Card (using Lock芒聙聶N芒聙聶Block
脗庐
) is an optional feature that allows you to manage debit cards on behalf of your customers. If a customer attends in-branch, an authorized
PaymentStream
芒聞垄
Direct user can perform the following actions at the customer芒聙聶s request:
Lock or unlock debit cards
Block or unblock any of the following actions from debit cards:
芒聢聮
ATM transactions
芒聢聮
Purchases and refunds
芒聢聮
International transactions
芒聢聮
Mobile Wallet transactions
芒聢聮
Flash/Tap debit card transactions
芒聢聮
E-Commerce transactions
Nickname debit cards
9.2	Accessing the Lock Your Debit Card Page
To access the Lock Your Debit Card page:
Access the customer芒聙聶s profile as described in Section 7.2, Accessing a Customer芒聙聶s Profile.
Select
Lock Your Debit Card
from the navigation menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Selecting Lock Your Debit Card
9.3 	Overview of the Lock Your Debit Card Screen
The Lock Your Debit Card page displays a list of the customer芒聙聶s debit cards. See Figure 2. The following details are displayed for each card:
芒聭
Card Name
芒聙聯 The name of the card, defaulting to the card description as provided from the banking host, overridden by a nickname if it芒聙聶s assigned to the card.
芒聭隆
Card Number
芒聙聯 The card number, masked to display only the last four digits.
芒聭垄
Locked Status
芒聙聯 The card is either 芒聙聹locked芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹unlocked芒聙聺. Locked cards cannot be used for any type of transaction. Locking a card overrides the blocking or unblocking of any individual type of card transactions.
芒聭拢
Types of Blocked Transactions
芒聙聯 If the card is unlocked, individual types of card transactions can be blocked or unblocked. Options include: ATM withdrawals, Purchases and refunds, International transactions, Contactless Mobile transactions, Contactless Debit Card transactions, and E-commerce transactions.
Figure 2: The Lock Your Debit Card Page
9.4 	Managing Debit Card Settings
To manage a debit card芒聙聶s locking and blocking settings:
Access the Lock Your Debit Card page as described in Section 9.2, Accessing the Lock Your Debit Card Page.
Select the
芒聹聨
icon of the debit card you want to edit. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Select the
芒聹聨
Icon
Update, as needed, the card name (or nickname), the card芒聙聶s locked status, and/or the debit card芒聙聶s blocked transaction types for the individual blocking options, then select
Save Changes
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select 芒聙聹Save Changes芒聙聺
Note:	For more information about locking the debit card or blocking individual types of debit card transactions, select the help icon
beside a listed option. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: The Help Icon
After saving any changes, the application display returns to the default Lock Your Debit Card page where the latest card changes are visible.
END
